$schema_comment: ADSK recommended upstream skills — not vendored. Pin and review before enterprise use.

checklist: Install or star signal supports trust
Review SKILL.md and scripts/ for secrets exfiltration

recommended.trust_notes: High-adoption engineering methodology pack. May assume Superpowers-specific paths (e.g. docs/superpowers/). Pin and adapt paths to your repo layout.

pin.note: Replace with an explicit tag/commit after your security review.

recommended.trust_notes: Official Skills CLI discovery helper. Still apply trust checklist before installing anything it suggests.

pin.note: Prefer a known-good CLI/skills release after review.

recommended.trust_notes: Official Anthropic helper for creating and evaluating skills. Aimed at maintainers, not every app developer.

optional.trust_notes: High-adoption UI craft skill. Optional for non-UI teams.

examples: other generic spec-driven-development packs that replace ADSK SDD
do_not_add.reason: Collides with first-party skills/spec-driven-workflow (trigger overlap + divergent paths/templates). Reviewed 2026-07-17: absorb useful patterns into ADSK SDD instead of vendoring; keep Superpowers for plan/TDD complement.
absorbed_patterns: Human/self gates between specify → plan → implement
Reframe vague goals as measurable success criteria
Optional PRODUCT/TECH split for large features only
